message:
feat(search): LRU embedding cache in progressive search and ProgressiveSearchRequest API

- Add LRU embedding cache (keyed by text) to SharedCassSyncEmbedder so
  embed_sync avoids redundant computation during progressive two-tier
  search — the same query text is embedded multiple times across initial
  and refined phases, and this eliminates duplicate model invocations
- Move embedding wrapping (FsSyncEmbedderAdapter + SharedCassSyncEmbedder)
  into load_progressive_context so cached embedders are shared across
  search calls rather than re-created per invocation
- Add ProgressiveSearchRequest struct to replace 7 positional arguments
  in search_progressive_with_callback, improving callsite readability
- Add ProgressiveLookupKey and ResolvedSemanticLookupRow type aliases
- Simplify skill filtering conditional and replace .or_else(|| Some(x))
  with .or(Some(x)) per Clippy lint
- Update compat gate tests for API changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
